mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.username, u.email, u.create_time as createTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_collection c WHERE c.user_id = u.user_id) as movieCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_comment c WHERE c.user_id = u.user_id) as commentCount FROM user u ORDER BY u.user_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET status = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT m.movie_id as movieId, m.movie_name as movieName, m.director, m.year, m.genre, m.region, m.avg_rating as avgRating, m.rating_count as ratingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_comment c WHERE c.movie_id = m.movie_id) as commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_collection c WHERE c.movie_id = m.movie_id) as collectionCount FROM movie_public m ORDER BY m.movie_id DESC

SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, u.username, m.movie_name as movieName, c.rating, c.content, c.create_time as createTime FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user) as userCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_public) as movieCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_comment) as commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_collection) as collectionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) as todayNewUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_comment WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) as todayNewComments
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM movie_comment WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
